title: Apple clang / g++ no coroutine support
body:
This is a placeholder for me to look at. I noticed I cannot run some tests (they're skipped because of no coroutine support). Sure enough, when I run configure, it's not finding coroutine support on Mac M1 / clang-1700.3.19.1

```bash
checking whether coroutines are supported by g++... no
checking whether coroutines are supported by g++ with -fcoroutines-ts... no
checking whether coroutines are supported by g++ with -fcoroutines... no
checking whether coroutines are supported by g++ with -fcoroutines-ts -Wno-deprecated-experimental-coroutine... no
checking whether coroutines are supported by g++ with -std=gnu++20... no
```

```bash
>>> g++ --version
Apple clang version 17.0.0 (clang-1700.3.19.1)
Target: arm64-apple-darwin24.6.0
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin
```
